name: Tomato Pasta
instructions: Boil pasta. Saute garlic in olive oil. Add tomatoes and simmer. Combine with pasta. Top with basil.

name: Pancakes
instructions: Mix flour, eggs, and milk. Heat pan. Pour batter and cook until golden on both sides.

name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Butter bread. Place cheese between slices. Cook on skillet until golden brown.

name: Chicken Stir Fry
instructions: Cook chicken in oil. Add vegetables. Stir fry with soy sauce. Serve over rice.

name: Omelette
instructions: Beat eggs. Pour into pan. Add fillings. Fold and cook until set.

name: Beef Tacos
instructions: Cook ground beef with seasoning. Fill tortillas with beef and toppings.

name: Caprese Salad
instructions: Slice tomatoes and mozzarella. Arrange with basil. Drizzle with olive oil.

name: Garlic Butter Shrimp
instructions: Cook shrimp in butter and garlic. Add lemon juice. Serve hot.

name: Fried Rice
instructions: Cook rice. Stir fry vegetables and eggs. Add rice and soy sauce.

name: Banana Smoothie
instructions: Blend banana, milk, and ice until smooth.
